title: MCP tool integration: select_context, add_conversation, conversation_history
acceptance_criteria: New MCP tool: select_context — params: query (Text), budget (Int, optional default 3000) → returns compact formatted context string
New MCP tool: add_conversation — params: question (Text), answer_summary (Text), source_nodes ([Text]) → stores conversation node + edges
New MCP tool: conversation_history — params: query (Text), limit (Int, optional default 10) → returns matching past conversations
Tools registered in tools/list response with proper descriptions
Tool dispatch in handleToolCall follows existing pattern in MCP.hs
Conversations are persisted to graphos-out/memory/ directory (reuse existing pattern)
No breaking changes to existing MCP tools
